README.md.reason: Established the Factory and product authority boundary.

CONTRIBUTING.md.reason: Required evidence-backed review for a Factory-governed product change.

CONTEXT.md.reason: Defined Bounded Manual Topology Grant as Factory-owned authority evidence distinct from DispatchGrant.

playbooks/devin-bicameral-factory-run.md.reason: Set implementation, validation, attestation, and draft-PR requirements.

blueprints/factory-run-signals/artifact-.reason: Kept grants and raw receipts out of customer packages and product runtime.

blueprints/factory-run-signals/domain-en.reason: Routed the new grant term to Factory context rather than MCP product vocabulary.

blueprints/factory-run-signals/factory-l.reason: Captured the topology/dispatch conflation and per-run attestation validator mismatch.

blueprints/factory-run-signals/minimum-p.reason: Required focused and full MCP validation beyond attestation.

blueprints/topology-execution.md.reason: Defined the bounded-manual-grant execution path and its provider-session exclusion.

skills/bic/topology-execution/SKILL.md.reason: Required exact grant validation, bounded execution, fail-closed evidence, and cleanup.

skills/bic/pre-pr-factory-attestation/SK.reason: Defined this per-PR attestation and hash verification step.

skills/bic/resolve-rfq/SKILL.md.reason: Preserved the explicit owner-decision and cross-repository authority boundaries.

skills/bic/spec-governance-gate/SKILL.md.reason: Recorded the advisory governance and state-refinement checkpoint.

docs/governance/factory-dispatch-control.reason: Kept provider-session dispatch exclusively behind DispatchGrant and Admission Controller authority.

schemas/bounded-manual-topology-grant.sc.reason: Supplied the canonical version-1 authorization contract consumed by the MCP validator.

local_setup_divergence.notes: The disposable MCP clone had no copied Factory skills/context. This run used the exact Factory PR #299 checkout at commit 4437acf; the new authority contract is not canonical on Factory main until human review and merge.

state_refinement.release_state: No product lifecycle behavior changed. Contributor topology attempts now require active bounded authorization before receipt assembly.
invariants: No canonical Bicameral state, authority, or persistence semantics changed.
A Bounded Manual Topology Grant never authorizes provider-session creation, retry, continuation, or termination.
Authorization metadata is not terminal evidence, product acceptance, merge, release, or deployment authority.
Missing, expired, revoked, mismatched, widened, or unsafe authorization fails closed before receipt assembly.
The grant validator and receipt tooling are contributor-only and remain absent from customer product runtime.

minimization_review.rationale: The MCP stores no grant state. It validates one immutable Factory-owned authorization document and records a sanitized summary; expiry and revocation remain authorization evidence, not product lifecycle states.

end_of_session_capture.notes: The session fixed the product validator mismatch that rejected required per-PR attestation filenames and surfaced no additional Factory artifact beyond PR #299.
